mapper.select:
SELECT SI.SALES_INVOICE_ID, SI.SO_ID, SI.CUSTOMER_ID, C.CUSTOMER_NAME, SI.ISSUE_DATE, SI.TOTAL_AMOUNT, SI.STATUS, SI.CREATED_AT FROM SALES_INVOICE SI JOIN CUSTOMER C ON C.CUSTOMER_ID = SI.CUSTOMER_ID WHERE 1 = 1
AND SI.STATUS = #{status}
AND C.CUSTOMER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{customerName} || '%'
AND SI.ISSUE_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND SI.ISSUE_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
ORDER BY SI.SALES_INVOICE_ID DESC

SELECT PI.PURCHASE_INVOICE_ID, PI.PO_ID, PI.SUPPLIER_ID, S.SUPPLIER_NAME, PI.ISSUE_DATE, PI.TOTAL_AMOUNT, PI.STATUS, PI.CREATED_AT FROM PURCHASE_INVOICE PI JOIN SUPPLIER S ON S.SUPPLIER_ID = PI.SUPPLIER_ID WHERE 1 = 1
AND PI.STATUS = #{status}
AND S.SUPPLIER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{supplierName} || '%'
AND PI.ISSUE_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND PI.ISSUE_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
ORDER BY PI.PURCHASE_INVOICE_ID DESC

SELECT AR.AR_ID, AR.CUSTOMER_ID, C.CUSTOMER_NAME, AR.SALES_INVOICE_ID, AR.TOTAL_AMOUNT, AR.PAID_AMOUNT, AR.REMAIN_AMOUNT, AR.DUE_DATE, AR.STATUS, AR.CREATED_AT FROM ACCOUNT_RECEIVABLE AR JOIN CUSTOMER C ON C.CUSTOMER_ID = AR.CUSTOMER_ID WHERE 1 = 1
AND AR.STATUS = #{status}
AND AR.DUE_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND AR.DUE_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
ORDER BY AR.AR_ID DESC

SELECT C.CUSTOMER_ID, C.CUSTOMER_NAME, NVL(SI.MONTH_SALES_AMOUNT, 0) AS MONTH_SALES_AMOUNT, NVL(AR.REMAIN_AMOUNT, 0) AS REMAIN_AMOUNT, 10000000 AS CREDIT_LIMIT, 10000000 - NVL(AR.REMAIN_AMOUNT, 0) AS CREDIT_BALANCE FROM CUSTOMER C LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CUSTOMER_ID, SUM(TOTAL_AMOUNT) AS MONTH_SALES_AMOUNT FROM SALES_INVOICE WHERE ISSUE_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND ISSUE_DATE < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1) GROUP BY CUSTOMER_ID ) SI ON SI.CUSTOMER_ID = C.CUSTOMER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CUSTOMER_ID, SUM(REMAIN_AMOUNT) AS REMAIN_AMOUNT FROM ACCOUNT_RECEIVABLE GROUP BY CUSTOMER_ID ) AR ON AR.CUSTOMER_ID = C.CUSTOMER_ID WHERE 1 = 1
AND C.CUSTOMER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{customerName} || '%'
ORDER BY NVL(AR.REMAIN_AMOUNT, 0) DESC

SELECT AP.AP_ID, AP.SUPPLIER_ID, S.SUPPLIER_NAME, AP.PURCHASE_INVOICE_ID, AP.TOTAL_AMOUNT, AP.PAID_AMOUNT, AP.REMAIN_AMOUNT, AP.DUE_DATE, AP.STATUS, AP.CREATED_AT FROM ACCOUNT_PAYABLE AP JOIN SUPPLIER S ON S.SUPPLIER_ID = AP.SUPPLIER_ID WHERE 1 = 1
AND AP.STATUS = #{status}
AND S.SUPPLIER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{supplierName} || '%'
AND AP.DUE_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND AP.DUE_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
ORDER BY AP.AP_ID DESC

SELECT AR.AR_ID, AR.CUSTOMER_ID, C.CUSTOMER_NAME, AR.TOTAL_AMOUNT, AR.PAID_AMOUNT, AR.REMAIN_AMOUNT, AR.DUE_DATE, AR.STATUS FROM ACCOUNT_RECEIVABLE AR JOIN CUSTOMER C ON C.CUSTOMER_ID = AR.CUSTOMER_ID WHERE AR.REMAIN_AMOUNT > 0
AND C.CUSTOMER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{customerName} || '%'
ORDER BY AR.AR_ID DESC

SELECT P.PAYMENT_ID, P.AR_ID, P.CUSTOMER_ID, C.CUSTOMER_NAME, P.PAYMENT_DATE, P.PAYMENT_AMOUNT, P.PAYMENT_TYPE, P.CREATED_BY, P.CREATED_AT FROM PAYMENT P JOIN CUSTOMER C ON C.CUSTOMER_ID = P.CUSTOMER_ID WHERE 1 = 1
AND C.CUSTOMER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{customerName} || '%'
AND P.PAYMENT_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND P.PAYMENT_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
ORDER BY P.PAYMENT_ID DESC

SELECT * FROM SETTLEMENT WHERE 1 = 1
AND START_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND END_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
ORDER BY SETTLEMENT_ID DESC

SELECT SI.SALES_INVOICE_ID, SI.SO_ID, SI.CUSTOMER_ID, C.CUSTOMER_NAME, SI.ISSUE_DATE, SI.TOTAL_AMOUNT, SI.STATUS, SI.CREATED_AT FROM SALES_INVOICE SI JOIN CUSTOMER C ON C.CUSTOMER_ID = SI.CUSTOMER_ID WHERE SI.SALES_INVOICE_ID = #{salesInvoiceId}

SELECT PI.PURCHASE_INVOICE_ID, PI.PO_ID, PI.SUPPLIER_ID, S.SUPPLIER_NAME, PI.ISSUE_DATE, PI.TOTAL_AMOUNT, PI.STATUS, PI.CREATED_AT FROM PURCHASE_INVOICE PI JOIN SUPPLIER S ON S.SUPPLIER_ID = PI.SUPPLIER_ID WHERE PI.PURCHASE_INVOICE_ID = #{purchaseInvoiceId}

SELECT AR.AR_ID, AR.CUSTOMER_ID, C.CUSTOMER_NAME, AR.SALES_INVOICE_ID, AR.TOTAL_AMOUNT, AR.PAID_AMOUNT, AR.REMAIN_AMOUNT, AR.DUE_DATE, AR.STATUS, AR.CREATED_AT FROM ACCOUNT_RECEIVABLE AR JOIN CUSTOMER C ON C.CUSTOMER_ID = AR.CUSTOMER_ID WHERE AR.AR_ID = #{arId}

SELECT AP.AP_ID, AP.SUPPLIER_ID, S.SUPPLIER_NAME, AP.PURCHASE_INVOICE_ID, AP.TOTAL_AMOUNT, AP.PAID_AMOUNT, AP.REMAIN_AMOUNT, AP.DUE_DATE, AP.STATUS, AP.CREATED_AT FROM ACCOUNT_PAYABLE AP JOIN SUPPLIER S ON S.SUPPLIER_ID = AP.SUPPLIER_ID WHERE AP.AP_ID = #{apId}

SELECT PP.PAYABLE_PAYMENT_ID, PP.AP_ID, PP.SUPPLIER_ID, S.SUPPLIER_NAME, PP.PAYMENT_DATE, PP.PAYMENT_AMOUNT, PP.PAYMENT_TYPE, PP.CREATED_BY, PP.CREATED_AT FROM PAYABLE_PAYMENT PP JOIN SUPPLIER S ON S.SUPPLIER_ID = PP.SUPPLIER_ID WHERE 1 = 1
AND S.SUPPLIER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{supplierName} || '%'
AND PP.PAYMENT_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND PP.PAYMENT_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
ORDER BY PP.PAYABLE_PAYMENT_ID DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PAYABLE_PAYMENT ( PAYABLE_PAYMENT_ID, AP_ID, SUPPLIER_ID, PAYMENT_DATE, PAYMENT_AMOUNT, PAYMENT_TYPE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_PAYABLE_PAYMENT.NEXTVAL, #{apId}, #{supplierId}, #{paymentDate}, #{paymentAmount}, #{paymentType}, #{createdBy}, SYSDATE )

SELECT SEQ_SALES_INVOICE.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO SALES_INVOICE ( SALES_INVOICE_ID, SO_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, ISSUE_DATE, TOTAL_AMOUNT, STATUS, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{salesInvoiceId}, #{soId}, #{customerId}, #{issueDate}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO ACCOUNT_RECEIVABLE ( AR_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, SALES_INVOICE_ID, TOTAL_AMOUNT, PAID_AMOUNT, REMAIN_AMOUNT, DUE_DATE, STATUS, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_ACCOUNT_RECEIVABLE.NEXTVAL, #{customerId}, #{salesInvoiceId}, #{totalAmount}, #{paidAmount}, #{remainAmount}, #{dueDate}, #{status}, SYSDATE )

SELECT SEQ_PURCHASE_INV.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO PURCHASE_INVOICE ( PURCHASE_INVOICE_ID, PO_ID, SUPPLIER_ID, ISSUE_DATE, TOTAL_AMOUNT, STATUS, CREATED_AT ) SELECT #{purchaseInvoiceId}, PO.PO_ID, PO.SUPPLIER_ID, SYSDATE, PO.TOTAL_AMOUNT, 'ISSUED', SYSDATE FROM PURCHASE_ORDER PO WHERE PO.PO_ID = #{poId} AND PO.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PURCHASE_INVOICE PI WHERE PI.PO_ID = PO.PO_ID )

INSERT INTO ACCOUNT_PAYABLE ( AP_ID, SUPPLIER_ID, PURCHASE_INVOICE_ID, TOTAL_AMOUNT, PAID_AMOUNT, REMAIN_AMOUNT, DUE_DATE, STATUS, CREATED_AT ) SELECT SEQ_AP.NEXTVAL, PI.SUPPLIER_ID, PI.PURCHASE_INVOICE_ID, PI.TOTAL_AMOUNT, 0, PI.TOTAL_AMOUNT, PI.ISSUE_DATE + 30, 'UNPAID', SYSDATE FROM PURCHASE_INVOICE PI WHERE PI.PURCHASE_INVOICE_ID = #{purchaseInvoiceId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ACCOUNT_PAYABLE AP WHERE AP.PURCHASE_INVOICE_ID = PI.PURCHASE_INVOICE_ID )

INSERT INTO PAYMENT ( PAYMENT_ID, AR_ID, CUSTOMER_ID, PAYMENT_DATE, PAYMENT_AMOUNT, PAYMENT_TYPE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_PAYMENT.NEXTVAL, #{arId}, #{customerId}, #{paymentDate}, #{paymentAmount}, #{paymentType}, #{createdBy}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE ACCOUNT_RECEIVABLE SET PAID_AMOUNT = PAID_AMOUNT + #{paymentAmount}, REMAIN_AMOUNT = REMAIN_AMOUNT - #{paymentAmount}, STATUS = CASE WHEN REMAIN_AMOUNT - #{paymentAmount} = 0 THEN 'PAID' ELSE 'PARTIAL' END WHERE AR_ID = #{arId}

UPDATE ACCOUNT_PAYABLE SET PAID_AMOUNT = PAID_AMOUNT + #{paidAmount}, REMAIN_AMOUNT = REMAIN_AMOUNT - #{paidAmount}, STATUS = CASE WHEN REMAIN_AMOUNT - #{paidAmount} = 0 THEN 'PAID' ELSE 'PARTIAL' END, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE AP_ID = #{apId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SETTLEMENT ( SETTLEMENT_ID, START_DATE, END_DATE, TOTAL_PURCHASE, TOTAL_SALES, TOTAL_RECEIVABLE, TOTAL_PAYABLE, GROSS_PROFIT, PROFIT_RATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_SETTLEMENT.NEXTVAL, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{totalPurchase}, #{totalSales}, #{totalReceivable}, #{totalPayable}, #{grossProfit}, #{profitRate}, #{createdBy}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select:
SELECT TO_CHAR(SI.ISSUE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') AS PERIOD, NVL(SUM(SI.TOTAL_AMOUNT), 0) AS SALES_AMOUNT FROM SALES_INVOICE SI WHERE 1 = 1
AND SI.ISSUE_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND SI.ISSUE_DATE >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -5)
AND SI.ISSUE_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND SI.ISSUE_DATE < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1)
AND SI.CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId}
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(SI.ISSUE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') ORDER BY PERIOD

SELECT NULL AS PERIOD, SI.CUSTOMER_ID, C.CUSTOMER_NAME, SUM(SI.TOTAL_AMOUNT) AS SALES_AMOUNT FROM SALES_INVOICE SI JOIN CUSTOMER C ON C.CUSTOMER_ID = SI.CUSTOMER_ID WHERE 1 = 1
AND SI.ISSUE_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND SI.ISSUE_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY SI.CUSTOMER_ID, C.CUSTOMER_NAME ORDER BY SALES_AMOUNT DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY

SELECT SOD.PRODUCT_ID, P.PRODUCT_NAME, SUM(SOD.AMOUNT) AS SALES_AMOUNT FROM SALES_INVOICE SI JOIN SALES_ORDER_DETAIL SOD ON SOD.SO_ID = SI.SO_ID JOIN PRODUCT P ON P.PRODUCT_ID = SOD.PRODUCT_ID WHERE 1 = 1
AND SI.ISSUE_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND SI.ISSUE_DATE <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY SOD.PRODUCT_ID, P.PRODUCT_NAME ORDER BY SALES_AMOUNT DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY
